title: Verify UI and Entry Points based on Trial Day
description: Tests that the correct entry point UI (widget vs. pill) is displayed on the homepage based on the number of days the trial has been active.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the 'Trial Corner' cohort.

steps.description: 1. As a Day 0 or Day 1 user, navigate to the homepage.
2. Verify the persistent, high-visibility widget ('Trial Mode: X Days Remaining') is displayed.
3. As a Day 2 user, navigate to the homepage.
4. Verify the homepage floating pill is displayed instead of the widget.
5. Click on both the widget (Step 2) and the pill (Step 4) and verify they navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub.

expected_result: The correct UI component is displayed based on the trial day, and both entry points correctly link to the Trial Corner. The 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' and 'trial-corner-widget-clicked' events are fired with the correct 'which varient' attribute.
